# Debrief: AcmePay — Senior Product Designer — Hiring manager — 2026-04-15

## What Landed
- Atlas Reliability story landed strong — VP Eng asked follow-up about AI governance
- Architecture+CS background framing resonated with technical lead
- Design award reference earned credibility early

## What Fumbled
- **What's your 90-day plan?** — fumbled, didn't have a structured answer ready

## Interviewer Signals
- **Lisa Chen** (Hiring Manager): Positive → asked about my AI governance approach in depth
- **Mark Patel** (VP Eng): Positive → leaned forward when I described autonomous loops

## Comp / Timeline / Process
- Mentioned $200K-$240K band

## Gut-Feel Verdict
8/10 — strong session, two of three interviewers asked deeper follow-ups

## Verdict
Advanced to next round
